title: Issue merging data in n8n
symptom: The user is unable to merge overdue and today's tasks in a single message. The merge operation does not yield the expected results.
not_this_if: Merge node is already set to Combine mode with All Possible Combinations
root_cause: The Merge node in n8n can operate in different modes. If it is not set to Combine mode with All Possible Combinations, it may not merge the data as intended, leading to incomplete or incorrect outputs.
fix_steps: Set the mode to Combine and select All Possible Combinations
agent_instruction: Change the Merge node to Combine mode with All Possible Combinations.
